name: UN Global Compact 2000 (Corporate Sustainability Initiative)
summary: The United Nations Global Compact (UNGC) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UNGC framework launched by the UN Secretary-General — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-corporate-sustainability framework + largest voluntary corporate-sustainability initiative globally framework (UNGC launched 26 July 2000 in New York by UN Secretary-General Kofi Annan + UNGC operations began 2000 + UNGC Office established by UN General Assembly Resolution A/RES/56/76 of 11 December 2001 — formal foundational UNGC framework establishing comprehensive UNGC organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-corporate-sustainability framework + largest voluntary corporate-sustainability initiative globally framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Ten Principles framework: 4 human-rights + 4 labour + 3 environment + 1 anti-corruption + 1 sustainable-development framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights UNGPs 2011 partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Communications on Progress COP annual framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Communications on Engagement COE annual framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Compact Local Networks 70+ countries framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal SDG Ambition framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Sanda Ojiambo UNGC CEO 2020-2025+ framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UNGC Leaders Summit annual framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 25,000+ business + 4,000+ non-business participants framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 13,000+ delisted companies for non-reporting framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Russia-listed-Russian-companies-pulled-2022 framework). The UNGC is operating upon 25,000+ business + 4,000+ non-business participants in 162 countries framework — comprehensive corporate-sustainability coverage framework. The framework is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UNGC Ten Principles + UNGPs partnership framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal business-and-human-rights-cross-border-family-rights framework. The UNGC Board + UNGC CEO + UNGC Office + UNGC Local Networks are the formal UNGC bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UNGC is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: UNGC Launch
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Global Compact launched 26 July 2000 in New York by UN Secretary-General Kofi Annan — formal foundational UNGC framework establishing comprehensive UNGC organisation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: UNGC Office Resolution 2001 (UN General Assembly Resolution A/RES/56/76)
statutory_framework.title: UNGC Office Resolution
statutory_framework.relevance: UNGC Office established by UN General Assembly Resolution A/RES/56/76 of 11 December 2001 — formal UNGC Office framework.

statutory_framework.citation: UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights UNGPs 2011
statutory_framework.title: UNGPs
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights UNGPs adopted 16 June 2011 by Human Rights Council Resolution 17/4 — formal foundational UNGPs framework with UNGC partnership framework.

statutory_framework.title: UNGC Ten Principles
statutory_framework.relevance: UNGC Ten Principles framework: Principles 1-2 Human Rights + Principles 3-6 Labour + Principles 7-9 Environment + Principle 10 Anti-Corruption framework — formal foundational UNGC Ten Principles framework.

apex_courts.name: UNGC Board
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UNGC composed of UN Secretary-General + business + civil society + labour + government representatives.

apex_courts.name: UNGC CEO
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UNGC — Sanda Ojiambo Kenya UNGC CEO 2020-2025+ framework.

apex_courts.name: UNGC Office
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative body for UNGC established by UNGA Resolution A/RES/56/76 of 2001.

apex_courts.name: UNGC Local Networks (70+ countries)
apex_courts.role: Formal UNGC Local Networks country-level body.

anonymisation_convention: UNGC-related communications operate via state-state framework via UN Secretary-General + UNGC Board; individual communications limited under UNGC framework + private-sector engagement via UNGC participant framework.

key_developments.title: Davos speech by Kofi Annan
key_developments.description: UN Secretary-General Kofi Annan World Economic Forum Davos speech 31 January 1999 proposing UN-business partnership framework — predecessor framework to UNGC.

key_developments.title: UNGC launched
key_developments.description: UN Global Compact launched 26 July 2000 in New York by UN Secretary-General Kofi Annan — formal foundational UNGC framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNGC Office established
key_developments.description: UNGC Office established by UN General Assembly Resolution A/RES/56/76 of 11 December 2001 — formal UNGC Office framework operational.

key_developments.title: Tenth Principle Anti-Corruption added
key_developments.description: Tenth Principle Anti-Corruption added 24 June 2004 to UNGC Ten Principles — formal UNGC Ten Principles complete framework operational.

key_developments.title: Communications on Progress COP mandatory
key_developments.description: Communications on Progress COP made mandatory 2007 — formal COP framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNGPs adopted
key_developments.description: UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights UNGPs adopted 16 June 2011 by Human Rights Council Resolution 17/4 — formal foundational UNGPs + UNGC partnership framework operational.

key_developments.title: SDGs adopted + SDG Ambition launched
key_developments.description: Sustainable Development Goals SDGs adopted 25 September 2015 + SDG Ambition launched 2020 framework — formal SDGs + SDG Ambition framework operational.

key_developments.title: Sanda Ojiambo UNGC CEO + COVID-19 + 20th anniversary
key_developments.description: Sanda Ojiambo Kenya became UNGC CEO 17 June 2020 + UNGC 20th anniversary 2020 + COVID-19 framework — formal Sanda Ojiambo + UNGC 20th anniversary framework operational.

key_developments.title: Russia-listed-Russian-companies-pulled + UNGC 13000 delisted companies
key_developments.description: Russia invaded Ukraine 24 February 2022 + Russia-listed-Russian-companies-pulled-from-UNGC 2022 framework + UNGC 13,000+ delisted companies for non-reporting framework — formal Russia-UNGC + delisting framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNGC 25th anniversary + UN80
key_developments.description: UNGC 25th anniversary 26 July 2025 + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework — formal UNGC 25th anniversary + UN80 framework operational.

structural_findings: UNGC operates a supranational global framework — places UNGC in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-corporate-sustainability framework + largest voluntary corporate-sustainability initiative globally framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-corporate-sustainability framework + largest voluntary corporate-sustainability initiative globally framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Ten Principles framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UNGPs partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Communications on Progress COP annual framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Communications on Engagement COE annual framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Compact Local Networks 70+ countries framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal SDG Ambition framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Sanda Ojiambo UNGC CEO 2020-2025+ framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UNGC Leaders Summit annual framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 25,000+ business + 4,000+ non-business participants framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 13,000+ delisted companies for non-reporting framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Russia-listed-Russian-companies-pulled-2022 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UNGC Ten Principles framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal Ten Principles framework: 4 human-rights + 4 labour + 3 environment + 1 anti-corruption + 1 sustainable-development.
Central jurisdiction of formal UNGPs partnership framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal UNGPs partnership framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UNGC participants + delisting framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal 25,000+ business + 4,000+ non-business participants + 13,000+ delisted companies for non-reporting framework.
25,000+ business + 4,000+ non-business participant + 70+ Local Networks framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive corporate-sustainability coverage framework.

1999 Davos speech + 2000 UNGC launched + 2001 UNGC Office + 2004 Anti-Corruption Tenth Principle + 2007 COP mandatory + 2011 UNGPs + 2015 SDGs + SDG Ambition + 2020 Sanda Ojiambo + 20th anniversary + COVID-19 + 2022 Russia-pulled + 2025 25th anniversary + UN80 UNGC-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UNGC + Ten Principles + UNGPs + COP + COE + Local Networks + SDG Ambition + Leaders Summit formal octet framework with formal business-and-human-rights-cross-border-family-rights PA-intersection framework.
